candidates.title: File:Covent Garden Underground Station - James Street entrance (6446631061) (2).jpg
candidates.author: Elliott Brown from Birmingham, United Kingdom
candidates.description: Second night out in the West End of London. Went through Covent Garden Underground station to get to the theatre showing Crazy For You on the Strand. This is Covent Garden Underground Station. It was quite busy here. Even on the tube it said use one of the other tube stations as this one gets busy with shoppers. Inside it has many lifts to get to the surface. It is on the Piccadilly line. Later after the show, we got lost going back to Leicester Square Underground Staiton. I think we should have gone back here. This is on James Street.
